member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Drawing.DocumentAccessMode
member.summary: Controls whether a document may be modified after it is opened.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Drawing.DocumentAccessMode.ReadOnly
member.summary: The document can be inspected but cannot be changed or saved.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Drawing.DocumentAccessMode.ReadWrite
member.summary: The document can be changed and saved explicitly.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Drawing.DocumentPersistenceMode
member.summary: Controls when changes are written to associated storage.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Drawing.DocumentPersistenceMode.Explicit
member.summary: Changes are written only by an explicit save operation.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Drawing.DocumentPersistenceMode.SaveOnDispose
member.summary: Changes are written during disposal and persistence failures are propagated.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Drawing.DocumentLoadOptions.AccessMode

member.summary: Fails when the destination already exists.

member.summary: Atomically replaces the destination when it exists.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Drawing.Internal.OfficeStreamWriter
member.summary: Writes complete Office artifacts to caller-owned streams using one consistent overwrite contract.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.Internal.OfficeStreamWriter.CanReplaceContents(System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Returns whether a stream can safely act as a document's associated destination. Associated destinations must support replacing the complete artifact on every parameterless save, not merely appending bytes at the stream's current position.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.Internal.OfficeStreamWriter.WriteAllBytes(System.IO.Stream,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Writes a complete artifact without closing the destination. Seekable streams are truncated before writing and rewound after a successful write; non-seekable streams are written at their current position.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.Internal.OfficeStreamWriter.WriteAllBytesAsync(System.IO.Stream,System.Byte[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously writes a complete artifact without closing the destination. Seekable streams are truncated before writing and rewound after a successful write.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeArabicTextShaper
member.summary: Applies dependency-free contextual presentation forms for the core Arabic alphabet.
member.remarks: The shaper preserves one UTF-16 character per base letter and intentionally does not synthesize optional ligatures. This keeps layout and logical-text mapping deterministic while improving joining for renderers that do not execute OpenType shaping tables.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeArabicTextShaper.Shape(System.String)
member.summary: Shapes supported Arabic letters into their contextual presentation forms.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeArabicTextShaper.CanShapeAllJoiningCharacters(System.String)
member.summary: Returns when every joining-script letter in the value is covered by the bounded core-Arabic shaper. Marks, controls, punctuation, and digits are neutral.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeArabicTextShaper.ToLogicalText(System.String)
member.summary: Maps presentation forms produced by this shaper back to core Arabic letters.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeLinearGradient
member.summary: Dependency-free linear gradient intent in normalized local coordinates. Coordinates use a top-left origin where 0,0 is the shape's top-left corner and 1,1 is its bottom-right corner. Importers may preserve finite user-space vectors that cross those bounds without weakening public constructor validation.

member.summary: Creates a two-stop gradient projected through the normalized drawing rectangle at the supplied angle.
member.param: Clockwise angle in degrees where 0 is left-to-right in local coordinates.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeLinearGradient.FromAngle(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeGradientStop},System.Double)
member.summary: Creates a gradient with ordered stops projected through the normalized drawing rectangle at the supplied angle.
member.param: Gradient stops. The first stop must be offset 0 and the last stop must be offset 1.
Clockwise angle in degrees where 0 is left-to-right in local coordinates.
member.returns: A gradient with endpoints clamped to the normalized drawing rectangle.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeRadialGradient
member.summary: Dependency-free radial gradient intent in normalized local coordinates. Coordinates use a top-left origin where 0,0 is the shape's top-left corner and 1,1 is its bottom-right corner. Ellipse centers may sit outside that box to preserve authored gradients whose focal point is off-canvas. Independent horizontal and vertical radii allow axis-aligned ellipses while the original circle constructors remain source-compatible.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeSvgImageRenderer
member.summary: Shared dependency-free SVG renderer for projected bitmap/vector images.
Appends an SVG image using normalized source cropping, optional clipping, rotation, and flips.
member.param: Resolved SVG image reference, such as a data URI.
Optional clip-path identifier. Required when source crop should be clipped to the destination rectangle.
Whether to mirror the image horizontally around the destination center.
Whether to mirror the image vertically around the destination center.
member.returns: The supplied builder for call chaining.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeSvgImageRenderer.AppendImage(System.Text.StringBuilder,System.String,OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeImageProjection,System.String,System.Nullable{OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeImagePlacement},System.String)
member.summary: Appends an SVG image using a shared projection that carries placement, source crop, rotation, and flips.
member.param: Resolved SVG image reference, such as a data URI.
Optional clip-path identifier. Required when the projection has a source crop.
Optional clip rectangle. Defaults to the projection placement when source crop is used.
member.returns: The supplied builder for call chaining.

member.summary: Appends an SVG image inside a viewport, using the projection placement as the clip for source-cropped images and the viewport as the clip for uncropped images.
member.param: Resolved SVG image reference, such as a data URI.
Clip-path identifier used for the viewport or crop clip.
Viewport rectangle that clips uncropped images.
member.returns: The supplied builder for call chaining.

member.summary: Writes an SVG image element using shared numeric formatting, optional preserve-aspect behavior, rotation, and flips.

Rotation center X coordinate. When omitted, the destination center is used.
Rotation center Y coordinate. When omitted, the destination center is used.
Whether to mirror the image horizontally around the rotation center.
Whether to mirror the image vertically around the rotation center.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTrueTypeFont
member.summary: Small managed TrueType/OpenType outline reader used for dependency-free text rasterization.
member.remarks: This type reads font files directly and does not call operating-system graphics or font APIs. It supports the simple glyf/cmap/hmtx path needed by OfficeIMO renderers and falls back cleanly when no suitable platform font file is available.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTrueTypeFont.TryLoadDefault(System.String@)
member.summary: Attempts to load a common platform font file without using platform font APIs.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTrueTypeFont.TryLoadFontFamily(System.String)
member.summary: Attempts to load the first resolvable font from a CSS/Office-style font-family fallback list.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTrueTypeFont.TryLoadFontFamily(System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Attempts to load the first resolvable font from a CSS/Office-style font-family fallback list.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTrueTypeFont.GetTextContours(System.String,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Reads flattened fill contours for the supplied text at a top-left baseline box.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTrueTypeFont.DisplayName
member.summary: Best-effort display name read from the font name table.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTrueTypeFont.CollectionIndex
member.summary: Collection index when the font was loaded from a TrueType collection.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficePngReader
member.summary: Dependency-free PNG decoder for common non-interlaced PNG images.

member.summary: Attempts to decode a PNG image into an RGBA raster buffer.

member.summary: Defines the zlib compression strategy used when encoding already-filtered PNG scanlines.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficePngCompression.Optimal
member.summary: Compress scanlines with the platform deflate implementation.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficePngCompression.Stored
member.summary: Store scanlines in zlib blocks without deflate compression.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficePngWriter
member.summary: Dependency-free PNG encoder for RGBA raster images.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficePngWriter.Encode(OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeRasterImage,OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficePngCompression)
member.summary: Encodes an RGBA image as PNG bytes.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficePngWriter.EncodeRgba(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Byte[],OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficePngCompression)
member.summary: Encodes raw RGBA pixels as PNG bytes.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficePngWriter.EncodeScanlines(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Byte[],OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficePngCompression)
member.summary: Encodes already-filtered PNG scanlines into a PNG file.
member.remarks: Each scanline must include its leading PNG filter byte. This entry point is intended for document adapters that already own source pixel/filter semantics but should still share OfficeIMO's PNG container, chunk, CRC, and zlib writing.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficePngWriter.CreateFromCompressedScanlines(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Wraps zlib-compressed, already-filtered PNG scanlines in a PNG file.
member.remarks: The compressed payload is written as the PNG IDAT chunk without decoding or recompressing it. This is useful when a source document already stores PNG-compatible Flate data.
